title: Mawhnei Mi Aw, Hong Pai Un!

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh’n hong sam, hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw;
Thu kong ngetsak, hong pai in! Mawh nei mi
Jesuh na neih hunzo ta, Mawh nei mi aw;
Amah na theih hunzo ta, hong pai meng

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na vangik tawh hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Jesuh zuan ding hong pai in! Mawh nei
Jesuh’n nang hong khem lo ding, Mawh nei mi aw;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong sap ngai in, hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
ding hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Jesuh’n nang hong samsam lai, Mawh nei mi aw;
kingetsak lailai, Mawh nei mi aw.
